caption: A man sits in a recording studio, wearing a white baseball cap, large silver headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters across the chest. He is positioned behind a dark desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. In the background, a white banner displays the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeatedly beneath gold stars, and a sign above reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, a small blue container is visible. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his hands, shifting from a resting position to an open-palm gesture and then to a pointed gesture. He wears a gold watch on his left wrist. A logo in the bottom corners of the screen features a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK".
